## Summary

Describe the bounded behavior change and the evidence it produces.

## Verification

List targeted tests and the full release checks that were run.

## Safety and claims

- [ ] Negative and malformed cases are covered.
- [ ] No secrets, personal data, or unsafe artifacts are included.
- [ ] product_ready remains false unless external release approval proves otherwise.
- [ ] HATE does not claim final release authority.
- [ ] Birdseye and generated Post-PoC status are current.
